declarations.name: left_less
declarations.statement: lemma left_less (l : List T) (p : l.length > 0) : (left l).length < l.length :=

declarations.name: right_less
declarations.statement: lemma right_less (l : List T) (p : l.length > 1) : (right l).length < l.length :=

declarations.name: double_left_less
declarations.statement: lemma double_left_less (l : List T) (p : l.length > 1) : (left (left l)).length < l.length :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
have h1 : (left (left l)).length < (left l).length := by
  have p' : (left l).length > 0 := by
    unfold left; simp; omega
  generalize (left l) = ll at *
  unfold left; simp; omega

have h2 : (left l).length < l.length := by
  have p' : l.length > 0 := by omega
  unfold left; simp; exact Nat.div_lt_self p' Nat.one_lt_two

have p' : (left l).length > 0 := by
  unfold left; simp; omega

declarations.name: double_right_less
declarations.statement: lemma double_right_less (l : List T) (p : l.length > 2) : (right (right l)).length < l.length :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
have h1 : (right (right l)).length < (right l).length := by
  have p' : (right l).length > 1 := by
    unfold right; simp; omega
  generalize (right l) = ll at *
  unfold right; simp; omega

have h2 : (right l).length < l.length := by
  have p' : l.length > 1 := by omega
  unfold right; simp; omega

have p' : (right l).length > 1 := by
  unfold right; simp; omega
